questions.question: PrometheusReporter vs PushGateway — когда какой?

options.text: PrometheusReporter (pull) — default для long-running streaming jobs. Flink exposes /metrics HTTP endpoint, Prometheus scrapes каждые 15s. Auto-discovery через K8s annotations. PushGateway — ONLY для short-lived batch jobs (Boundedness.BOUNDED) — jobs exit прежде чем Prometheus scrape. Streaming с PushGateway — antipattern, ненужный hop

questions.explanation: Pull (PrometheusReporter): standard для streaming. Configure: metrics.reporter.prom.factory.class + port 9249. K8s annotations: prometheus.io/scrape=true, prometheus.io/port=9249. Service discovery picks up new TMs automatically. Push (PushGateway): metrics push в HTTP gateway, persists между job runs. Configure: randomJobNameSuffix=true (unique runs), deleteOnShutdown=false (persist after exit). PushGateway accumulates metrics forever если не cleanup — нужно TTL script. Use только для batch.

questions.question: Какая стандартная Kubernetes service discovery setup для Flink Prometheus scraping?

options.text: kubernetes_sd_configs role: pod. Relabel rules: keep если pod label app=flink, target_label __address__ от prometheus.io/port annotation. Pod annotations: prometheus.io/scrape=true, prometheus.io/port=9249, prometheus.io/path=/metrics. Pod labels: app=flink, component=taskmanager. Auto-discovery — новый TM pod автоматически scraped

questions.explanation: Standard pattern для K8s. relabel_configs: keep если pod label соответствует, target_label __address__ от port annotation (через regex replacement), preserve labels namespace/pod для filtering. Это elastic — autoscaling TMs автоматически discovered. Если Flink K8s Operator (recommended 2.x): operator автоматически apply annotations к JM и TM pods через podTemplate. Поверх — Prometheus picks up. Каждый scrape: 15s interval, 1-2KB metrics endpoint, low overhead. NetworkPolicy должен позволять Prometheus IP scrape port 9249.

questions.question: Production scenario: 50 jobs × 100 subtasks × 50 metrics = 250k series. После года: Prometheus queries timeout, disk full. План?

options.text: (1) Quick wins: metrics.reporter.prom.scope.variables.excludes: subtask_index — reduces series 10-50×. metric_relabel_configs drop noisy Shuffle metrics. (2) Medium-term: migrate Prometheus → VictoriaMetrics (high cardinality optimized, 5-10× lower disk, 3× faster queries, Prometheus-compatible). (3) Long-term: tiered storage — Tier 1 hot (7 days, VM single), Tier 2 cold (1 year, S3 backend). OTel reporter for new jobs (unified stack)

questions.explanation: High cardinality observability требует proper tooling. Vanilla Prometheus great для small-medium, но не scales enterprise streaming platforms. Quick win: drop subtask_index label — metrics aggregate per operator вместо per subtask. Lose subtask-level granularity (skew detection harder), keep operator-level. VictoriaMetrics: high cardinality optimized, Prometheus-compatible (Grafana plug-and-play), better compression. Migration: dual-write период (remote_write from Prometheus к VM), verify consistency, switchover Grafana, decommission Prometheus. 1-2 weeks staged. Long-term: split tiers для cost efficiency.

questions.question: Port 9249 hardcoded — нельзя использовать port range для multi-TM на одном host.
questions.explanation: False. metrics.reporter.prom.port: 9249-9259 — port range syntax. Каждый TM picks first available port в range. Это нужно когда несколько TaskManagers на одном host (старые non-K8s deployments). Prometheus scrape config должен охватывать range (relabel rule extracts port от annotation). В K8s обычно один TM per pod — port range не нужен, just 9249. Но для bare-metal / Docker compose deployments — multi-TM common pattern, range mandatory во избежание port conflicts.
